title: ficus semicordata var. semicordata
intro: Ficus semicordata var. semicordata, also known as 'Nigritella', is a deciduous tree species native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihistamine effects, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ficus semicordata var. semicordata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and addressing skin issues such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the leaves and bark are used to prepare herbal remedies, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
